verdict: All natural Γ_0(t) hypotheses (∝H, ∝H², slow decay) give Γ_0(past) > Γ_0(now), which predicts ρ_Λ(past) > ρ_Λ(now) → w_a > 0 (phantom-like). This is OPPOSITE to DESI w_a<0 finding! SQT may either: (a) REJECT DESI evolution (await DR3 confirmation), (b) require non-trivial τ_q(t) or ε(t) variation.
